basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 949 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission (MPPSC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 949 Assistant Professor Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official MPPSC website. The last date to submit the application form is 18-05-2026. In this article, you’ll find the MPPSC Assistant Professor Posts recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and Online application form.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age Limit: 21 Years Maximum Age limit: 40 Years Age relaxation is applicable as per rules.

qualification.details: A Master's Degree in the relevant field with at least 55% marks (or an equivalent grade). Candidates must have qualified the National Eligibility Test (NET) conducted by UGC/CSIR/ICAR, or the State Eligibility Test (SET)/State Level Eligibility Test (SLET). Exemption: Candidates possessing a Ph.D. degree are not required to meet the NET/SET/SLET criteria, as per UGC regulations. All academic qualifications must be from a recognized University or Institution, whether in India or abroad.

how_to_apply: Visit the official MPPSC website at www.mppsc.mp.gov.in.
Navigate to and click on the "Apply Online" link for the "Assistant Professor Recruitment 2025 (Advertisement No. 10-24/2025)."
Complete the registration process by providing your basic details to generate login credentials.
Log in using the credentials you created and fill out the online application form, including personal, educational, and communication information.
Upload the scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and necessary documents (such as the 10th-grade marksheet for age proof and degree certificates) as per the prescribed format and size.
Pay the application fee online using net banking, credit/debit cards, or other available payment options.
Carefully review all the information you’ve entered before submitting the form.
Submit the completed form and save a printout of the final application for future reference.
